name: MGP INGREDIENTS INC
business: MGP is a leading producer of branded and distilled spirits, as well as food ingredient solutions. Branded spirits include premium bourbon, rye, and other whiskeys, and grain neutral spirits including vodka and gin. Ingredient solutions include specialty wheat starches and proteins, commodity starches and proteins, and biofuel.
sellsTo: state governments that directly control the sale of alcohol
manufacturers and processors of finished packaged goods

exposures.sentence: Our Branded Spirits segment consists of a portfolio of high-quality brands, which we produce through our distilleries and bottling facilities and sell to distributors or to state governments that directly control the sale of alcohol.

Our Distilling Solutions segment consists primarily of the production of premium bourbon, rye, and other whiskeys (brown goods) and grain neutral spirits (GNS), including vodka and gin, which are sold directly or indirectly to manufacturers of other branded spirits.

Our Ingredient Solutions segment consists primarily of specialty wheat starches, specialty wheat proteins, commodity wheat starches, and commodity wheat protein products which are sold to customers pursuant to purchase orders.

catalysts.event: Dividend payment to stockholders and RSU holders
catalysts.sentence: On February 25, 2026, we announced a dividend payable to stockholders of record of our Common Stock, resulting in dividend equivalents payable to RSU holders, of $0.12 per share and per RSU. The dividend and dividend equivalent are payable on March 27, 2026 to stockholders of record and RSU holders as of March 13, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected repurchase of Convertible Senior Notes
catalysts.sentence: We expect some holders of the Convertible Senior Notes to require the Company to repurchase the Convertible Senior Notes during the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Payment of full contingent consideration for Penelope acquisition
catalysts.sentence: the Company will pay out the full contingent consideration during the first half of 2026.
